miner.title: Miner Setup
miner.description: Choose the miner type and enter the miner IP address.

host.title: Miner Details
host.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your {miner_type}.

pools.title: Pool Profiles
pools.description:
Optional: configure up to three pool profiles for {device_name}. Leave fields blank to skip a profile.

Enter only the base username in each Pool User field. The integration automatically appends .{miner_hostname} when saving (final format: username.{miner_hostname}).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Miner
reconfigure.description: Update miner type and host for this existing entry.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the miner. Check the IP address and ensure the miner is powered on.
error.connection_timeout: Connection timed out. The miner may be unreachable or taking too long to respond.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host address. Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
error.invalid_pool: Each configured pool must include URL, port, user, and password.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.fleet_already_configured: A Fleet dashboard entry is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_not_supported: Fleet entry reconfiguration is not supported.

set_pool.name: Set Pool Settings
set_pool.description: Update the stratum pool settings on a Bitaxe/NerdAxe miner.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The IP address or hostname of the miner

stratum_user.name: Stratum User
stratum_user.description: Username for the pool (usually Bitcoin wallet address)
